prompt: UTG 60bb opens, BB overfolds flops. Flop dry K72r.
rationale: Small cbet prints vs overfolding BB; low risk, maintains range edge.

prompt: MP 40bb vs BTN float heavy, board J86ss.
rationale: Larger size extracts from floats and charges draws at mid depth.

prompt: CO 28bb vs SB calls wide, flop T42r.
rationale: Cheap denial versus wide range; preserves stack when called.

prompt: BTN 25bb vs BB overbluff turns after check.
rationale: Check back marginal pairs to induce bluffs you can call later.

prompt: SB 18bb shove stack behind; BB sticky caller.
rationale: ICM pressure makes marginal defend poor; preserve stack.

prompt: BB 20bb faces CO 30% pot cbet on AQ5r.
rationale: Undersized cbet signals weakness; raise folds out air and weak pairs.

prompt: MP 35bb vs BB probe-happy on missed cbets.
rationale: Pot control with medium strength; call probes instead of bloating pot.

prompt: CO 32bb vs BTN overcall river after missed draws.
rationale: Use thin value raise against overcalling ranges with bluff-catch bias.

prompt: BTN 22bb vs SB limp-call range, flop 653r.
rationale: Pressure medium pairs and random overs; gain fold equity at shallow depth.

prompt: BB 15bb facing BTN min-raise, population overfolds shove.
rationale: Jam suited broadways to exploit fold-to-jam frequency.

prompt: SB 25bb completes, BB stabs too often.
rationale: Lead paired or dry boards to deny auto-stabs and take initiative.

prompt: UTG 45bb vs BB calls wide, flop 993r.
rationale: Range and board advantage allow cheap cbet; folds out ace-high floats.

prompt: CO 30bb vs MP overfolds to turn barrels.
rationale: Semi-bluff raises pressure mid-strength hands that want to reach showdown.

prompt: BTN 18bb vs BB hero-calls river too often.
rationale: Reduce bluffs; value-bet clearer spots, avoid spew versus sticky player.

prompt: BB 28bb vs CO small flop cbet on wet board.
rationale: Punish small sizing; fold equity plus equity denial on draws.

prompt: SB 20bb vs BB overfolds to flop pressure.
rationale: Frequent small cbets capture folds while limiting risk at shallow stacks.
